title: 中國甩難！100多個國家係WHO發起的「調查武漢肺炎」提案，只係要確定病毒的動物來源。連中國都贊成！

replies.msg:
據華盛頓郵報記者報導，原來澳洲係WHO發起的「調查武漢肺炎」提案，其實只係確定病毒的動物來源，根本唔係追求中國責任。
這個所謂「調查武漢肺炎」提案，淡化了中國的責任。連中國都計劃贊成此提案。
相反，美國暫時未表態支持。
今次WHO大會，維尼更「應邀」發表演講。法國加碼資助WHO。根本中國仍然係WHO的盟主。

Washington Post China correspondent // 华盛顿邮报驻华记者施家曦
https://twitter.com/gerryshih/status/1262300650173427712

Draft resolution by EU, Aus, et al doesn't really say to investigate the origins of COVID-19 beyond "working with OIE and FAO to identify the zoonotic source...and prevent the establishment of new zoonotic reservoirs." China has signaled its support.

Zhao LJ said today China was consulted all along on this draft and it's "aligned." China likely happy with this WHA & resolution which does not emphasize review of past missteps or blame but squarely framed as forward looking and promoting collaboration.

============

WHO faces global call for investigation at general assembly

NBC News
May 18, 2020, 9:49 pm

Amid an intensifying blame game over the World Health Organization's handling of the coronavirus, China’s leader Xi Jinping announced a $2 billion package to help tackle the pandemic at the organization's general assembly Monday.

Xi also called for a "global review" of the international response, but said it should be led by the WHO itself and launched only after the virus "is brought under control."

Xi's statement via video link came as more than 100 health ministers from around the world prepared to call for an independent evaluation of the WHO's handling of the outbreak.


The draft of the resolution, which has the support of 116 countries so far, is calling for "an impartial, independent and comprehensive" evaluation of the actions of the WHO and their timelines pertaining to the COVID-19 pandemic. It also seeks to identify the origin of the virus.
